info.title: new-api Resource Center API
info.summary: Assets, asynchronous image and video tasks, uploads, and Webhooks.
info.description: Public Resource Center API. Creating asynchronous image or video tasks uses a standard API Token; task queries, uploads, assets, and proxied video downloads use a Resource Center API Key; outbound Webhook verification uses a dedicated Webhook Key.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Read generated assets with a Resource Center API Key.

tags.name: Async Images
tags.description: Create and query durable image generation/edit tasks.

tags.name: Async Videos
tags.description: Create and query provider-neutral video generation, edit, extension, and remix tasks.

tags.name: Image Uploads
tags.description: Upload temporary URL inputs before creating an edit task.

get.description: Lists only assets owned by the API token user.

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Filter by asset type.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 按资源类型筛选。

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Public APIs return available assets.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 公开接口只返回 available 状态的资源。

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Filter by exact task ID.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 按任务 ID 精确筛选。

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Filter by exact model.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 按模型名称精确筛选。

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search asset ID, task ID, filename, or URL.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 搜索资源 ID、任务 ID、文件名或 URL。

parameters.description: Minimum creation time in Unix seconds.

parameters.name: end_timestamp

parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 创建时间上限，Unix 秒。

parameters.description: Page number. Alias: p.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 页码，别名为 p。

parameters.description: Page size. Aliases: ps and size.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 每页数量，别名为 ps 和 size。

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: Asset ID such as asset_xxx.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 资源 ID，例如 asset_xxx。

get.description: Streams a temporary upstream-backed video. Range requests are supported. A 410 response means the upstream resource expired. Public CDN URLs may be returned directly by Asset and task responses instead of using this proxy.

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: Video Asset ID such as asset_xxx.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 视频资源 ID，例如 asset_xxx。

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: Optional RFC 9110 byte range.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 可选的 RFC 9110 字节范围。

200.description: CSV with asset_id, task_id, asset_type, url, filename, model, and created_at.

post.description: Accepts the normalized JSON contract for generation or edit tasks, or synchronous-style multipart local files for edit tasks. Returns immediately after the task, billing reservation, credential lease, and durable dispatch are stored. Reusing an Idempotency-Key with the same normalized fields and file contents returns the original task.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional caller key, unique per user. Maximum 128 characters.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 可选的调用方幂等 Key，同一用户内唯一，最长 128 个字符。

Location.x-description-zh-CN: 该任务的规范查询 URL。

Retry-After.x-description-zh-CN: 建议的轮询间隔，单位为秒。

Idempotent-Replayed.description: true when the original task is replayed.
Idempotent-Replayed.x-description-zh-CN: 返回原幂等任务时为 true。

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by one public task status.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 按一个公开任务状态筛选。

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Filter by generation or edit.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 按 generation 或 edit 操作筛选。

parameters.name: client_reference_id
parameters.description: Filter by the caller business reference.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 按调用方业务关联 ID 筛选。

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Exclusive lower creation-time bound in Unix seconds.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 创建时间下限，Unix 秒，不包含该时间。

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Exclusive upper creation-time bound in Unix seconds.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 创建时间上限，Unix 秒，不包含该时间。

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Task ID cursor returned by the previous page.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 上一页返回的任务 ID 游标。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 每页数量。

200.x-description-zh-CN: 使用游标分页的任务列表。

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: Public task ID such as task_xxx.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 公开任务 ID，例如 task_xxx。

post.description: Returned tasks preserve request order. Unknown or unauthorized IDs are listed in missing.

200.description: Ordered task list with missing IDs.
200.x-description-zh-CN: 按请求顺序返回任务，并列出缺失 ID。

post.summary: Upload image inputs as multipart data
post.description: Accepts up to 10 repeated image files and one mask. Each PNG, JPEG, or WebP file is limited to 20 MiB and the request to 100 MiB. Temporary URLs should be submitted to a task promptly.
Accepts plain base64 or data URLs. Use images plus optional mask, or uploads with an optional field value of image or mask.

Creates a normalized generation, edit, extension, or remix task. Provider capability and parameter limits are validated by the selected provider adaptor. Compatibility endpoints under /v1/videos remain unchanged.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional caller key, unique per user. Maximum 128 characters. The same key and request replay the original task; a different request returns 409.
parameters.x-description-zh-CN: 可选的调用方幂等 Key，同一用户内唯一，最长 128 个字符。相同 Key 和请求会返回原任务，不同请求返回 409。

post.description: Sent with Authorization: Bearer wk-.... The Webhook Key is generated with the account Webhook configuration and has no API permissions. Any 2xx response succeeds and its body is ignored. Network errors and non-2xx responses are retried using the administrator-configured fixed interval and maximum attempts (defaults: 3 total attempts, 30 seconds).

2XX.description: Delivery accepted. The response body is ignored.

default.description: Delivery failed and is retried until the configured maximum attempt count is reached.

post.description: Sent with Authorization: Bearer wk-.... The Webhook Key is generated with the account Webhook configuration and has no API permissions. Any 2xx response succeeds and its body is ignored. Network errors and non-2xx responses are retried using the administrator-configured fixed interval and maximum attempts (defaults: 3 total attempts, 30 seconds).

2XX.description: Delivery accepted. The response body is ignored.

default.description: Delivery failed and is retried until the configured maximum attempt count is reached.

post.description: Sent for every normalized video operation with Authorization: Bearer wk-.... data.object is identical to GET /v1/video/tasks/{task_id}. Video URLs are temporary and may require an ak_ Resource Center API Key when url_auth is resource_api_key.

2XX.description: Delivery accepted. The response body is ignored.

default.description: Delivery failed and is retried until the configured maximum attempt count is reached.

post.description: Sent for failed generation, edit, extension, or remix tasks with Authorization: Bearer wk-.... No Asset is required for a failure event.

2XX.description: Delivery accepted. The response body is ignored.

default.description: Delivery failed and is retried until the configured maximum attempt count is reached.

ModelTokenAuth.description: A standard API Token from Token Management. Its model limits, group, quota, and audit identity apply when creating asynchronous image or video tasks. It may also download an owned proxied video Asset.

ResourceCenterAuth.description: A Resource Center API Key generated on the Resource Center API Key tab. It authorizes image/video task queries, uploads, asset reads, and proxied video downloads, but cannot create tasks or authenticate Webhooks.

WebhookAuth.description: A dedicated Webhook Key generated with the account Webhook configuration. Receivers use it only to verify outbound callbacks; it grants no API access.

provider.description: Provider namespace for a provider-managed file reference.
provider.x-description-zh-CN: 供应商托管文件所属的命名空间。

file_id.x-description-zh-CN: 供应商托管文件的 ID。

VideoTaskSource.description: Exactly one source form: url, or provider together with file_id.
VideoTaskSource.x-description-zh-CN: 只能选择一种来源：url，或 provider 与 file_id 组合。

prompt.description: Natural-language instruction for generation or editing.
prompt.x-description-zh-CN: 用于生成或编辑的自然语言指令。

image.description: One primary image source. For xAI generation this is the starting frame. Support in other operations is provider-specific.
image.x-description-zh-CN: 单个主图片来源；对 xAI generation 来说是起始帧，其他操作是否支持由供应商决定。

reference_images.description: Multiple reference image sources. Allowed combinations and provider-specific limits are validated by the selected adaptor.
reference_images.x-description-zh-CN: 多个参考图片来源；允许的组合和供应商限制由所选适配器校验。

VideoTaskInput.x-description-zh-CN: 提示词及供应商无关的图片或视频来源。非 generation 操作必须提供 video。

duration.description: Requested output duration. For extension this is the new segment duration. Provider-specific bounds are validated by the selected adaptor.
duration.x-description-zh-CN: 请求输出时长；extension 中表示新增片段时长，具体范围由所选适配器校验。

aspect_ratio.x-description-zh-CN: 供应商支持的输出宽高比。

resolution.x-description-zh-CN: 供应商支持的输出分辨率。
